title: チューリップ賞の後に・前哨戦敗北

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhhh! I just couldn't get there! Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham! Wham! Vodka pounds her fists into the ground. She couldn't defeat Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh my, you poor thing. Your face is bright red.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! When did you get so fast?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I'm not the same person I was before my
debut.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've studied tactics and positions, and I have
complete control over my running now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series isn't a playground. I'm here for
one thing—and that's to get even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Next time! Just wait and see! I was just
gettin' warmed up today!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm bringin' it for real at the Oka Sho. You'd
better be ready!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll see you at the Oka Sho. Something tells
me things won't change, though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They will! I'll show you! I'm gonna make my
comeback!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka snaps and walks away frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um... Is Vodka running a little differently?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Her style is as full of holes as ever, but it seems
more intimidating now...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: How has she been training?
choice_data_list:
I think it's the result of how many real races
she's been running in.

I think it's the result of how many real races
she's been running in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the start of her career, Vodka has been
going after G1 races without hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the results of her stretching her limits are
starting to show in how she runs.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Real races, huh? I see...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When she mentioned the G1 last year, I thought
she was being stupid again, but I guess there was
some method to her madness.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But she still has a ways to go to catch up to me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...All right, then. I'll just have to see how far she's
come. The next race is for real.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's words aren't just a simple
promise, but a full-blown declaration of war.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Real talk, I underestimated her. I guess she's not
just a little Goody Two-shoes after all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She's shown her true nature now. This is gettin'
interestin'.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, about my next race... I'm doin' the
Oka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whaddya mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that the Triple Crown tour and Tiara
tour cover different races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho starts the Tiara, so racers usually
follow it up with the Japanese Oaks and the
Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, on the other hand, is part of
the Triple Crown. Vodka will have to give up on it
if she chooses the Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So if I run in the Oka Sho, I can't run in the
Derby?!
choice_data_list: It's not impossible, but it's not common.
It's not impossible, but it's not common.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both the Triple Crown and the Tiara can only be
attempted once. If Vodka switches around, she
loses her shot at either title.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Then what am I supposed to do?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna run with Scarlet in the Classics now that
she's stronger, that means I have to give up on
the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got it. How about this?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What if I run in all six races and win the Triple Crown and Tiara?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh, fine! Then what now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a big decision. Do the Tiara tour and run
against her rival or do the Classic Triple Crown
and run in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no correct choice, but Vodka and I need
to make the decision together.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I think I've got an idea. Wanna hear it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I can give up either. Before, I
would've given Scarlet up without a thought...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But she's runnin' differently now. She's not just
talk anymore. I feel real potential there.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This feelin' of wantin' to run in a real G1 race with
her isn't gonna go away. So...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How about going from the Oka Sho to the
Japanese Derby? That's what I feel like I need to
do.
choice_data_list:
And you're okay giving up on both the Triple
Crown and Tiara?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I-I didn't say I wanna give up! But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is the only way I can think of to go after
everythin' I want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's determination in her voice. It's still too
early to make a decision at this stage, but...
choice_data_list: Let's go to the Oka Sho next.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You'll really let me?!
choice_data_list: For now, but we'll have to see how things go.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So we'll decide the next steps after the Oka Sho,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's do that. I know it's not something
to be taken lightly.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way I can just end on a loss. First,
I'm gonna face Scarlet in the Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to wait on choosing the path forward
for now. It all depends on the results of the Oka
Sho, as well as her determination afterward.
